summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Socket.IO integration and Salle/Chirurgien/Patient display features. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Light Client Interventions shows Salle/Chirurgien/Patient with icons when present, shows 'Intervention planifiée' fallback when null. Light Client Picking header shows Salle/Chirurgien/Patient with icons. Admin Interventions page works with delete confirmation dialog.
passed_tests: Backend: Socket.IO polling endpoint /socket.io/?EIO=4&transport=polling returns 200
Backend: Health endpoint /api/health returns status ok
Backend: POST /api/interventions with operating_room, surgeon, patient_file_number creates intervention
Backend: POST /api/interventions with null fields creates intervention with null values
Backend: GET /api/interventions/{id} returns operating_room, surgeon, patient_file_number
Backend: GET /api/interventions?filter=today returns interventions with all fields
Backend: PUT /api/interventions/{id} updates operating_room, surgeon, patient_file_number
Backend: DELETE /api/interventions/{id} returns {deleted: true}
Backend: DELETE /api/interventions/{id} removes intervention (GET returns 404)
Backend: Create intervention emits intervention_changed socket event
Backend: Add product to intervention works correctly
Frontend Light Client Interventions: Shows Salle with MapPin icon when present
Frontend Light Client Interventions: Shows Chirurgien with User icon when present
Frontend Light Client Interventions: Shows Patient file with FileText icon when present
Frontend Light Client Interventions: Shows 'Intervention planifiée' fallback when Salle/Chirurgien are null
Frontend Light Client Picking: Header shows Salle with MapPin icon
Frontend Light Client Picking: Header shows Chirurgien with User icon
Frontend Light Client Picking: Header shows 'Dossier: {patient_file_number}' with FileText icon
Frontend Light Client Picking: Header shows 'Intervention' fallback when fields are null
Frontend Admin Interventions: Table shows SALLE, CHIRURGIEN, PATIENT columns
Frontend Admin Interventions: Create intervention form has all fields
Frontend Admin Interventions: Delete button shows confirmation dialog
Frontend Admin Interventions: Delete confirmation has 'Annuler' and 'Supprimer' buttons
Frontend Admin Interventions: useSocketEvent hook integrated for auto-refresh
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_socketio_interventions.py - Created new test file for Socket.IO and intervention CRUD
seed_data_creation: Created test intervention (Salle UI-TEST-A1, Dr. UI Test Surgeon, PAT-UI-TEST-001) during UI testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Socket.IO integration and Salle/Chirurgien/Patient display features are fully implemented and tested. Key points: 1) Socket.IO endpoint accessible at /socket.io/?EIO=4&transport=polling. 2) Backend emits 'intervention_changed' event on create/update/delete. 3) Frontend useSocketEvent hook in useSocket.js subscribes to events. 4) Light Client Interventions.js shows Salle/Chirurgien/Patient with MapPin/User/FileText icons, fallback 'Intervention planifiée' for null. 5) Light Client Picking.js header shows same fields with icons, fallback 'Intervention' for null. 6) Admin Interventions.js has delete confirmation dialog with data-testid='delete-confirm-btn' and 'delete-cancel-btn'.

delete_confirmation.title: Supprimer l'intervention ?
delete_confirmation.message: Cette action est irréversible. Tous les produits associés seront également supprimés.
